## What this changes

<!-- Brief description, and a link to the issue if there is one. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes.
- [ ] Self-lint stays clean (`node packages/cli/dist/src/index.js lint`).
- [ ] If `docs/standard/` changed: changelog entry **and** version bump in `packages/standard/package.json`.
- [ ] If a dependency was added: ADR in `docs/project/04_adrs/`.
- [ ] If project work started/finished: `docs/project/01_product/roadmap.md` board updated.
